metric_methods.repeated_sentence_start_rate: Wilson score interval for binomial proportion

provenance_note: Visible public FineWeb Tier-1 human bank only; no generated outputs or hidden-test data.
review_limitations: This calibration proposal describes the frozen visible Tier-1 human bank and is not a population-level estimate.
The 32-document bank is domain-diverse but selected from one pinned Common Crawl snapshot.
Repetition incidence uses a 95% Wilson binomial interval; continuous metrics use deterministic central order-statistic intervals.
Values are not active until separately reviewed and transferred into immutable harness/calibration.json.
